subOrgs.name: Regional Transportation Planning
subOrgs.description: Transportation Improvement Program (TIP), Long-Range Transportation Plan, federal FHWA/FTA pass-through

subOrgs.name: MPO Administration
subOrgs.description: MPO director, policy board support, public engagement, interagency coordination

capitalNote: The MPO administers federal transportation funds for the Santa Fe metro area but does not directly spend capital. Project allocations are made through the Transportation Improvement Program (TIP) to member agencies.
